summary: Host scan marks an external symlink skill as available; install succeeds and creates a project symlink whose realpath escapes the Skill Host Folder.
After a project symlink was externally changed to point outside the host, remove.skill refused it as not removable; external target and host skill remained intact.
Global external symlink is classified as external_symlink with warning; scan is read-only and target remains unchanged.
Invalid QA DB exits with database error against SKILLBOX_DB_PATH; real app DB mtime/size unchanged, no fallback to user data.
Crash-recovery path simulated with stale running/queued operations; relaunch marks them failed with process restarted and leaves zero active operations.
Synthetic queued/running operations are marked failed on startup; no stale running state remains.
Destructive flows require confirmation and cancel preserves data, but the custom Remove Skill modal has no role=dialog/aria-modal semantics; accessibility confirmation is incomplete.
rsync_copy/copy install mode is not implemented in this version: install.skill has no mode parameter and ProjectService creates symlinks only. Needs release-scope decision or QA bank re-tiering.
